MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa appeared by zoom for Barbara De Vries.

Mr. Siracusa apologized the Court stating that it was missed being calendared by his office because of the COVID continuance, that he did not advise his Client that she needed to do the accounting and requested a four-week continuance. Status on filing of the 16th accounting is continued to October 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
